name: Riot Platforms, Inc.
business: Riot Platforms is a vertically integrated digital infrastructure company engaged in developing and optimizing large-scale power assets. It operates two reportable business segments: Bitcoin Mining and Engineering. The Bitcoin Mining segment mines bitcoin, while the Engineering segment designs and manufactures power-distribution equipment and engineered-to-order electrical products for large-scale industrial and governmental customers.

exposures.sentence: We are in the process of developing scalable data center platforms at our Corsicana Facility and Rockdale Facility.
data center solutions designed to support non-mining workloads, including potential applications in AI and HPC.
Our Engineering business designs and manufactures power-distribution equipment and engineered-to-order electrical products.

We voluntarily participate in load response programs operated by ERCOT and MISO, whereby we temporarily give ERCOT and MISO the right to curtail a set portion of our power load at their discretion in exchange for a fee.

catalysts.event: Receipt of all miners under current purchase orders
catalysts.sentence: All miners under current purchase orders are expected to be received by the second quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Kentucky Facility reaching total capacity of approximately 232 MW
catalysts.sentence: We are targeting the Kentucky Facility to reach a total capacity of approximately 232 MW through the remainder of 2026, with additional expansion anticipated.
